visual_description: A woman with short brown hair, wearing a white lab coat over a striped shirt and a name badge, is seated beside a hospital bed. She looks toward the side, her posture upright and hands clasped in her lap. Behind her, medical equipment and a pink basin sit on a wooden cart, while a hospital bed with a patient covered by a pink blanket is visible in the background.
audio_description: The audio features a female voice with a high pitch and moderate pace, speaking in a neutral tone without any noticeable inflection.
